mapper.select: SELECT id, default_model, default_temperature, default_max_output_tokens, top_p, frequency_penalty, presence_penalty, stop_sequences, updated_at FROM app_openrouter_generation_settings WHERE id = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_openrouter_generation_settings SET default_model = #{defaultModel}, default_temperature = #{defaultTemperature}, default_max_output_tokens = #{defaultMaxOutputTokens}, top_p = #{topP}, frequency_penalty = #{frequencyPenalty}, presence_penalty = #{presencePenalty}, stop_sequences = #{stopSequences}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
